fmiModelDescription.description: F-16 HOTAS + side-stick interface for pilot inputs and trim switches.

ScalarVariable.name: bridgeInput.stick_pitch_norm
ScalarVariable.description: External pilot command provided by an interactive bridge/frontend adapter.

ScalarVariable.name: bridgeInput.stick_roll_norm
ScalarVariable.description: External pilot command provided by an interactive bridge/frontend adapter.

ScalarVariable.name: bridgeInput.rudder_norm
ScalarVariable.description: External pilot command provided by an interactive bridge/frontend adapter.

ScalarVariable.name: bridgeInput.throttle_norm
ScalarVariable.description: External pilot command provided by an interactive bridge/frontend adapter.

ScalarVariable.name: bridgeInput.throttle_aux_norm
ScalarVariable.description: External pilot command provided by an interactive bridge/frontend adapter.

ScalarVariable.name: bridgeInput.button_mask
ScalarVariable.description: External pilot command provided by an interactive bridge/frontend adapter.

ScalarVariable.name: bridgeInput.hat_x
ScalarVariable.description: External pilot command provided by an interactive bridge/frontend adapter.

ScalarVariable.name: bridgeInput.hat_y
ScalarVariable.description: External pilot command provided by an interactive bridge/frontend adapter.

ScalarVariable.name: bridgeInput.mode_switch
ScalarVariable.description: External pilot command provided by an interactive bridge/frontend adapter.

ScalarVariable.name: bridgeInput.reserved
ScalarVariable.description: External pilot command provided by an interactive bridge/frontend adapter.

ScalarVariable.name: pilotCommand.stick_pitch_norm
ScalarVariable.description: HOTAS-control bundle forwarded for mission computer sensor fusion.

ScalarVariable.name: pilotCommand.stick_roll_norm
ScalarVariable.description: HOTAS-control bundle forwarded for mission computer sensor fusion.

ScalarVariable.name: pilotCommand.rudder_norm
ScalarVariable.description: HOTAS-control bundle forwarded for mission computer sensor fusion.

ScalarVariable.name: pilotCommand.throttle_norm
ScalarVariable.description: HOTAS-control bundle forwarded for mission computer sensor fusion.

ScalarVariable.name: pilotCommand.throttle_aux_norm
ScalarVariable.description: HOTAS-control bundle forwarded for mission computer sensor fusion.

ScalarVariable.name: pilotCommand.button_mask
ScalarVariable.description: HOTAS-control bundle forwarded for mission computer sensor fusion.

ScalarVariable.name: pilotCommand.hat_x
ScalarVariable.description: HOTAS-control bundle forwarded for mission computer sensor fusion.

ScalarVariable.name: pilotCommand.hat_y
ScalarVariable.description: HOTAS-control bundle forwarded for mission computer sensor fusion.

ScalarVariable.name: pilotCommand.mode_switch
ScalarVariable.description: HOTAS-control bundle forwarded for mission computer sensor fusion.

ScalarVariable.name: pilotCommand.reserved
ScalarVariable.description: HOTAS-control bundle forwarded for mission computer sensor fusion.
